profile.title: My Profile

profile.pmpRequired: Please enter your ΠΜΠ to continue.
profile.profileRequired: Please complete all your profile details to continue.
profile.errForbidden: You are not allowed to do this.
profile.noStaffProfile: No staff profile is linked to your account yet — contact the system admin.
profile.guardBody: To use the portal, first fill in all the required details: first name, last name, phone, specialty and ΠΜΠ.

checks.title: Data Checks
checks.subtitle: Timetable coverage and group integrity, computed live
checks.noIssues: All checks passed — no issues found.
checks.issueCount: {count, plural, one {# issue found} other {# issues found}}
checks.smsFlaggedHint: The default SMS number is missing or doesn't match a parent/guardian.
checks.emptyGroupsHint: These groups have no students at all — either enrol students or remove the group's leftover timetable.
checks.coverageHint: Every student must have exactly one lesson in every period of the week. Missing periods mean the student belongs to no group with a lesson then; overlaps mean two of their groups have a lesson at the same time. Use Fix to move the student between groups.
checks.gapsSummary: {count, plural, one {# period without a lesson} other {# periods without a lesson}}
checks.overlapsSummary: {count, plural, one {# double-booked period} other {# double-booked periods}}
checks.overlapBetween: Lessons at the same time in: {groups}
checks.redundantHint: {count, plural, one {# student is} other {# students are}} enrolled in their own homegroup as a subject group (import artifact). This is harmless for the timetable but clutters the data — remove the duplicates with one click.

accessCode.title: Access code
accessCode.description: Give this code to the student and their parents/guardians so they can activate their account.
accessCode.noneViewer: No code has been generated yet. The system admin will issue it.
accessCode.regenerateWarning: The old code will stop working. Continue?
accessCode.guardianClaims: {n, plural, =0 {No guardian accounts} one {# guardian account} other {# guardian accounts}}

activate.haveCode: Have an access code? Activate your account
activate.errGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

activate.errPasswordWeak: Password must be at least 8 characters.
activate.errEmailTaken: This email is already in use.
activate.errStudentClaimed: The student account has already been activated.
activate.errOtpExpired: The verification code expired. Please start again.
activate.errEmailSend: Could not send email. Please contact the school.
activate.errGuardianCap: The maximum number of guardians (2) has already registered for this student. Please contact the school.

register.errorStaffNameNotFound: That name was not found in the timetable. Contact the administrator.

officeAttendance.eraseHint: Erased absences stay on record but do NOT count towards the totals. Every action is audited.

setup.errorNotFound: That name has already been claimed or does not exist in the schedule.
setup.errorRejected: Your previous claim was rejected. Please select again or contact an administrator.

setup.allClaimed: All schedule names have already been claimed.

chaperoneActivities.emptyHint: An administrator will assign you to an activity when needed.

adminUsers.title: Staff
adminUsers.unlinkedProfilesCount: {count, plural, one {# unlinked profile} other {# unlinked profiles}}
adminUsers.unlinkedCardTitle: Unlinked Profiles — schedule records with no user account attached
adminUsers.passwordSignInHint: Set a password so this user can sign in with email & password.
adminUsers.noStaffProfileLinked: No staff profile linked to this account — link one from the Staff list to see schedule data.
adminUsers.cannotDeleteSelf: You cannot delete your own account.
adminUsers.deleteHint: Permanently removes the login and frees the timetable name so another person can claim that role. The staff profile is kept (detached) so attendance, referral, substitution and message history is preserved. An account with its own admin activity (audit log, resolved referrals, substitution plans) cannot be deleted.
adminUsers.deleteConfirmDescription: This permanently deletes the login (email/password and sessions) and releases its timetable name so it can be re-claimed. The staff profile is kept (detached) to preserve attendance, referral, substitution and message history. This cannot be undone. If the account has its own admin activity (audit log, resolved referrals, substitution plans) the deletion is refused.
adminUsers.primarySuperAdminHint: This account's main role is Super Admin.
adminUsers.cannotChangeOwnAccess: You cannot change your own access.
adminUsers.hasAdminGrantHint: Has full system administration access on top of their normal role.
adminUsers.revokeConfirmDescription: {name} will immediately lose access to the admin portal and all administration functions. Their normal role and features are not affected.
adminUsers.grantAdminHint: Grants full system administration on top of their normal role.
adminUsers.grantConfirmDescription: {name} will gain FULL system administration access — all student data, settings, user management and audit logs — while keeping their current role and portal. The change takes effect immediately and is recorded in the audit log.
adminUsers.rowSpecialEdHint: Deputy B responsible for special education.
adminUsers.rowSubCoordHint: Runs the daily substitution plan: generates, reviews and finalizes it.
adminUsers.rowDdkHint: Reviews students' ΔΔΚ points and prints the year-end reports.
adminUsers.passwordSetSuccess: Password set — the user can now sign in with email & password.

adminStaff.title: Teacher Profiles
adminStaff.unlinkedCardTitle: Unlinked Profiles — no user account attached

adminStudents.title: Students
adminStudents.enrolledCount: {count, plural, one {# student enrolled} other {# students enrolled}}
adminStudents.selectHomegroup: Select a homegroup to view students
adminStudents.name: Name
adminStudents.codesGeneratedToast: {count, plural, one {Generated # access code} other {Generated # access codes}}
adminStudents.generateCodesDescription: {count, plural, one {This will create an access code for # student that doesn’t have one yet. Existing codes are not changed.} other {This will create an access code for # students that don’t have one yet. Existing codes are not changed.}}
adminStudents.freePeriodCount: {count, plural, one {# free period} other {# free periods}}
adminStudents.noGroupsAssigned: No groups assigned — the student has no timetable.
adminStudents.conflictWarning: Two of this student’s groups have a lesson at the same time — the conflicting cells are highlighted below. Fix it from
adminStudents.parentsImportNote: Recorded from the import. A parent gets a login account only when they activate their access code (see Accounts below).
adminStudents.noSubjectGroups: No subject groups assigned — import enrollment first.
adminStudents.editNoParents: None linked. Add SMS recipients from the student page; parents come from the import.
adminStudents.editPhoneNote: Changing a phone here also updates that contact in the student’s SMS recipients.
adminStudents.enrollIntro: Assigns each student to their subject groups. Re-importing syncs each student to their row — groups in the file are added, ones no longer listed are removed. Only groups the file mentions are ever removed: assignments made by hand to groups outside the file are kept. (A row with an unrecognised group code is added-only, never cleared, so a typo can’t drop enrollments.)
adminStudents.enrollFormatIntro: The file must follow the standard ministry enrollment export layout:
adminStudents.enrollFormatColB: Column B: registry number (ΑΡ.ΜΗΤ.) — used to match the student
adminStudents.enrollFormatColF: Columns F onwards: subject group codes
adminStudents.enrollNotFoundNote: Students not found by registry number are reported as warnings and skipped.
adminStudents.importIntro: Upload the student registry Excel file. Existing students (matched by registry number) are updated; new ones are created. Parent accounts and SMS contacts are created automatically from the file.
adminStudents.importPlaceholderNote: Students without an email get a placeholder address ({address}) that can be updated later.
adminStudents.flaggedCount: {count, plural, one {# student to review (SMS)} other {# students to review (SMS)}}
adminStudents.importFlaggedNote: Fix these from the student page (set a default SMS recipient or add a number). They’re also listed under Admin → Checks.

adminAttendance.title: Attendance
adminAttendance.absencesCount: {count, plural, one {# absence / late entry} other {# absences / late entries}}
adminAttendance.empty: No absences recorded for this date
adminAttendance.selectGroupHint: Select a group to begin marking attendance.
adminAttendance.noSlot: No timetable slot found for this group / period / day.

adminTimetable.title: Timetable
adminTimetable.importSubtitle: Upload the teacher timetable Excel exported from the ministry system. Slots are upserted — re-importing is safe.
adminTimetable.formatIntro: The file must follow the standard ministry schedule export layout:
adminTimetable.formatColA: Column A: teacher name (every other row)
adminTimetable.importFailed: Import failed with no details. Check server logs.

adminPermits.title: Exit Permits
adminPermits.issuedByNote: issued by the day's on-duty deputy

adminGroupDetail.homeroomCount: {count, plural, one {# homeroom student} other {# homeroom students}}

adminSettings.title: Settings
adminSettings.subtitle: School-wide configuration
adminSettings.schoolNameHint: Shown at the top-left of every page. Leave empty to show the default app name.
adminSettings.termDatesIntro: The ministry announces these dates at the start of each school year. They drive the per-term absence totals, the test-scheduling deadlines, and the holiday closures shown across the app.
adminSettings.errTermDatesRequired: The four term start/end dates are required.
adminSettings.errTermOrder: Term dates must be in order: Α΄ start ≤ Α΄ end < Β΄ start ≤ Β΄ end.
adminSettings.errDeadline1: The Α΄ test deadline must fall inside Α΄ τετράμηνο.
adminSettings.errDeadline2: The Β΄ test deadline must fall inside Β΄ τετράμηνο.
adminSettings.errHolidayPair: {name} holidays need both a first and a last day.
adminSettings.errHolidayOrder: {name} holidays: the first day must come before the last.
adminSettings.dutyIntro: Fixed weekly schedule: the assigned headteacher is on duty (εφημερεύει) every week on that day. Duty events (referrals, exit permits) will be routed to them.
adminSettings.noDeputies: No active headteachers with a linked staff profile found — link them under Staff first.
adminSettings.gradesIntro: Grade entry stays frozen until the term is unlocked here. Teachers can neither enter nor edit grades for a locked term.
adminSettings.attendanceLockIntro: When enabled, a teacher with unmarked past lessons is blocked from the rest of the teacher portal until they record them. Lessons someone else already marked (e.g. a cover) and days the teacher was absent don't count.
adminSettings.maxTestsTitle: Max tests per student per week
adminSettings.maxTestsHint: A student cannot receive more than this many tests in a single calendar week. Big tests are additionally limited to 1 per day.
adminSettings.maxGuardiansHint: How many parent/guardian accounts may activate a student's access code. The student's own account is separate and always allowed.
adminSettings.apiUrlHint: Obtain from websms.com.cy — SMS via API
adminSettings.senderIdHint: Name shown on recipient's phone (max 11 chars)
adminSettings.usernameHint: Resend: the literal username resend. (M365 later: the mailbox email.)
adminSettings.passwordHint: Resend: paste an API key from resend.com → API Keys. (M365 later: the mailbox password / App Password.)
adminSettings.deliverabilityNote: Resend delivers to anyone only from a domain you verified in Resend (DNS). To just test, use onboarding@resend.dev as the From address and send to your own Resend signup email.
adminSettings.testUsesValuesHint: Uses the values above (save first to make them permanent).
adminSettings.roomsHint: The school's room list — feeds the room-change picker in Substitutions. «κιόσκια» is not a room and does not belong here.
adminSettings.specialEdCodesHint: The problem-code and accommodation catalogs. An empty database initializes itself from the ministry list. A code used on student records is never deleted — it is deactivated (hidden from the form, kept on the records).
adminSettings.seCodeDeactivated: This code is used on student records — it was deactivated instead of deleted.
